# Creator Anime Studio

Creator Anime Studio is a creator focused anime image landing site for marketers, storytellers, indie game teams, and visual teams. The public pages use clean example images for ad review and search discovery.

Core pages:

- Home: https://creators.anime-ai.art/
- Gallery: https://creators.anime-ai.art/gallery/
- Prompt examples: https://creators.anime-ai.art/prompt-examples/
- Character consistency: https://creators.anime-ai.art/character-consistency/
- Pricing: https://creators.anime-ai.art/pricing/
- FAQ: https://creators.anime-ai.art/faq/
- Spanish home: https://creators.anime-ai.art/es/
- Japanese home: https://creators.anime-ai.art/ja/
- Chinese home: https://creators.anime-ai.art/zh/

Product facts:

- Users create anime images from text prompts.
- Free accounts can start without a credit card.
- Images are delivered without platform watermarks on every tier.
- Generated images may be used commercially, subject to the user's rights to their own inputs and any applicable local rules.
- Users can save a generated image as a character reference and reuse that character in later scenes.
- Paid tiers increase weekly credits and saved character capacity.

Sitemap: https://creators.anime-ai.art/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://creators.anime-ai.art/robots.txt
